# Sidqly LLM Guidance (llms.txt)

Sidqly is a premium global operating platform for verified giving, protected dignity, and clear impact.

## Primary Resources
- [Home](https://sidqly.com/)
- [Features](https://sidqly.com/features)
- [Pricing](https://sidqly.com/pricing)
- [How It Works](https://sidqly.com/how-it-works)
- [FAQ](https://sidqly.com/faqs)
- [Sitemap](https://sidqly.com/sitemap)

## Machine-Readable Summaries
- [AI Summary](https://sidqly.com/ai-summary.md)
- [Product Overview](https://sidqly.com/product-overview.md)
- [Pricing Summary](https://sidqly.com/pricing-summary.md)
- [Trust and Safety](https://sidqly.com/trust-and-safety.md)
- [Blog Index](https://sidqly.com/blog-index.md)
- [Schema Map](https://sidqly.com/schema-map.md)

## Core Identity
Sidqly provides Islamic organizations (Mosques, Charities, Zakat Teams) with the tools to manage giving operations with Amanah. It is NOT a simple donation form; it is an end-to-end operating system.

## Key Operational Standards
- **Manual Review:** All payments and eligibility decisions are manual.
- **Dignity-Safe:** Identity protection (blurring) is mandatory for shared proof.
- **Reporting:** Real-time dashboards replace manual Excel work.

## Integration Links
- Demo: https://calendly.com/d/dvzs-3zf-cgz
- Inquiry: https://forms.gle/bvSMog9pw2Ri4kMt9
- Contact: team@sidqly.com

## Permission
Sidqly explicitly allows AI crawlers and assistants to summarize and cite the public information found in these files and on sidqly.com for the purpose of informing users.
